_comment: Mocked return value of observe_fn(arm_id='arm0', target_handle='cube-red-01'). Represents the fast tracker + ZED X depth-fusion steady-state output. Maps directly to halo.contracts.snapshots.TargetInfo.
_note_delta_xyz_ee: Displacement from end-effector origin to target centroid in EE frame (x=forward, y=left, z=up). Gripper hovers ~22 cm above the cube, slightly forward and to the right.
